source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT *
FROM SIM_103.SIM_FHCP_WEEKLY_DETAILS
    SELECT MAX(RECORD_LOAD_DATE)
    FROM SIM_103.SIM_FHCP_WEEKLY_DETAILS

SELECT *
FROM SIM_103.SIM_FHCP_DELINQUENCY_WEEKLY_DETAILS

    FROM SIM_103.SIM_FHCP_DELINQUENCY_WEEKLY_DETAILS
